title: Microsoft 365 Defender Training
description:
Microsoft 365 Defender training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.

Microsoft 365 Defender training refers to the process of learning how to use and manage the Microsoft 365 Defender security solution. This training typically includes a range of topics, including the product's features and capabilities, how to set up and configure the solution, how to monitor and respond to threats, and how to troubleshoot common issues.

Microsoft 365 Defender is a cloud-based security solution that helps protect your organization's data and devices against a wide range of threats, including malware, phishing attacks, and other types of cyberattacks. The solution provides advanced threat protection across different platforms, including Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.
